name: shopscout
description: ShopScout browser extension — product capture, comparison, and AI analysis.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --allowJs --checkJs --target es2020 --moduleResolution node --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --skipLibCheck --noImplicitAny false content/productSchema.js data/specHeuristic.js shared/values/cellValues.js shared/projections/specProjection.js shared/edits/ratingWriter.js
